series_metadata.series_description: Records used to initiate a replacement warrant when original warrant is lost or stolen. Records may include: Auditor N-53 Substitute Warrant; Auditor N-54 Duplicate; Auditor N-94 Bond of Duplicate; Auditor N-248 Affidavit of Forgery; and Auditor N-262 Rewrite of Warrant and supporting documentation.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for seven (7) state fiscal years and then destroy. A Certificate of Disposal is required when destroying these records. ; Electronic: Retain for seven (7) state fiscal years and then destroy. A Certificate of Disposal is required when destroying these records., Paper: Trash ; Electronic: Delete
